## Responsibly Using Generative AI

:::{.callout-tip icon="false" collapse="false"}
### {{< fa brain >}} Learning Objectives

After completing this topic you will be able to: 

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

- <u>TBD</u>

:::

### What Do We Mean By "AI"?

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction

### How You Can and Cannot Use AI

:::{.panel-tabset}
#### What AI _Can_ Do

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction

#### What AI _Cannot_ Do

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction

:::

### AI and the Environment, Intellectual Property, and Justice

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction
